hero.description: A centralized platform to explore profiles, skills, and expertise across Grupo Garnier. Find the right talent for every project.
hero.servicesTagline: document external services, define required skills, and auto-match the right internal talent.
hero.placeholder: Hero product shot — Skill*form directory dashboard showing search, filters, and a grid of talent profile cards in dark mode.

features.title: Everything You
features.subtitle: A comprehensive talent management platform designed for modern organizations.

directory.title: Talent Directory
directory.desc: Search and filter through your entire organization. Find people by skills, departments, languages, and expertise areas.

profiles.title: Rich Profiles
profiles.desc: Comprehensive talent profiles with skills, experience, awards, and project history.

groups.title: Team Groups
groups.desc: Organize talent into custom groups for projects, departments, and initiatives.

analytics.title: Talent Analytics
analytics.desc: Get insights into skill distribution, experience levels, language capabilities, and department composition across your organization.

services.title: Services & Matching
services.desc: Document external services, track vendors and budgets, and auto-match the best internal talent for every brief.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Ready
multilingual.desc: Full English and Spanish support across the platform, with language preferences saved per user.

capabilities.desc: Every feature designed to help you discover, organize, and leverage the talent within your organization.

trust.title: Trusted by
trust.subtitle: See how teams across Grupo Garnier use Skill*form every day.

t1.quote: "Skill*form transformed how we find the right people for our projects. The search and filter capabilities are incredible."
t1.name: María García

t2.quote: "Having all our team's skills and experience in one place has made resource allocation so much more efficient."
t2.name: Carlos Rodríguez

t3.quote: "The multi-language support and role-based access make it perfect for our international team structure."
t3.name: Ana Martínez

services.title: Services &
services.subtitle: Director-level employees and admins can document every external service, manage vendors and budgets, and let Skill*form auto-match the best internal talent — based on real skills, experience, and proficiency.

step1.title: Document services
step1.desc: Capture every external production service — agency, department, budget, vendors, and frequency — in one shared catalog.

step2.title: Define required skills
step2.desc: Set the skills each service needs, mark them as required, preferred, or nice-to-have, and tune minimum proficiency.

step3.title: Auto-match talent
step3.desc: Skill*form scores every employee nightly, surfaces the best internal matches, and lets directors add or remove people manually.

services.access: Available to department directors, organizer admins, master admins, and senior employees (director, VP, C-level).
services.placeholder: Services module screenshot — service detail view with required skills, vendor list, and the auto-matched internal talent panel.

footer.tagline: Discover and connect with talent across your organization.

showcase.title: A glimpse of
showcase.placeholder1: Profile detail page — header with avatar, role, country flag, plus skills, languages, and project history tabs.
showcase.placeholder2: Master admin analytics dashboard — bar charts of skill distribution and seniority breakdown across the organization.
showcase.placeholder3: Director my team roster view — list of direct reports with seniority badges and quick-action buttons.
showcase.placeholder4: Service create wizard — step-by-step form for naming a service, picking a category, and assigning vendors.

cta.title: Bring your talent into
cta.subtitle: Sign in to start exploring profiles, services, and the matching engine.
